en: If your company is required to comply with Guatemala's Occupational Health and Safety requirements, you will be asked to provide relevant documents in a subsequent form(s).
Avetta PQF - Guatemala Occupational Health and Safety Plan Applicability Assessment

Is your company required to comply with Guatemala's Occupational Health and Safety Plan requirements as regulated by the Ministry of Labor and IGSS and maintain applicable documentation to show compliance?
Please select from the following reason(s) your company is exempt from complying with Guatemala's Occupational Health and Safety Plan requirements.
The company is a sole proprietorship with no other employees.
The company has fewer than 10 employees.
The company does not have any employees in Guatemala.
By providing your electronic signature, you confirm that the information submitted in this questionnaire is true, complete, and accurate in accordance with Guatemalan legislation.
